rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 48]>"Leave the arms"? <unk[5:0]>What are you
talking about?

I wasn't singing anything remotely like
that! I've never sung a song with
those lyrics...
<unk[3:0:257]>♪Seek the storm, seek the storm...♪<unk[5:0]>
Is that maybe what you heard?

Because that's what I was singing!


<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>You also heard "for if not, I'll do
you harm"?

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>Leave your arms or I'll kill you? <unk[5:0]>Hahaha!<unk[5:0]>
What kind of nonsensical song is that?

♪Fear it not, you will stay warm.♪


Those are the lyrics I was singing! And if
you put it all together...

<unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 48]>♪Seek the storm, seek the storm...
Fear it not, you will stay warm.♪

<unk[3:0:258]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>It's a song about a cute little fox who is
proud of their warm fur coat, and they
chase storms since they don't get cold!
<unk[3:0:256]>Anyway, I'm not trying to cause trouble
or anything... <unk[5:1]>But I don't think it's entirely
my fault if people misheard things either.
I just like how my voice sounds here.<unk[5:0]>
Prettier. More refined.

<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 48]>Hmph. It sounded fine to me, but
everyone else is hearing dire threats.

"Leave the arms..." I guess that explains
why weapons kept getting thrown in the
well every morning.
